languages.text: Ксеносы повредили батареи, питающие лифт. Чтобы вновь запустить его, придется перенаправить энергию, отключив от сети устройства в поселении.

traits.locale_text: Ксеносы повредили батареи, питающие лифт. Чтобы вновь запустить его, придется перенаправить энергию, отключив от сети устройства в поселении.

languages.text: The xenos have compromised the batteries feeding the elevator. Reactivation requires rerouting power and cutting off settlement devices from the grid.
languages.original_text: Ксеносы повредили батареи, питающие лифт. Чтобы вновь запустить его, придется перенаправить энергию, отключив от сети устройства в поселении.

traits.locale_text: The xenos have compromised the batteries feeding the elevator. Reactivation requires rerouting power and cutting off settlement devices from the grid.
The xenos have compromised the batteries feeding the elevator. Reactivation requires rerouting power and cutting off settlement devices from the grid.
The xenos have compromised the batteries feeding the elevator. Reactivation requires rerouting power and cutting off settlement devices from the grid.
The xenos have compromised the batteries feeding the elevator. Reactivation requires rerouting power and cutting off settlement devices from the grid.

languages.text: Los xenos han afectado a las baterías que alimentan el ascensor. Para reactivarlo, hay que redirigir la energía y desconectar dispositivos del asentamiento de la red.
languages.original_text: The xenos have compromised the batteries feeding the elevator. Reactivation requires rerouting power and cutting off settlement devices from the grid.

traits.locale_text: Los xenos han afectado a las baterías que alimentan el ascensor. Para reactivarlo, hay que redirigir la energía y desconectar dispositivos del asentamiento de la red.

languages.text: 异形破坏了为电梯供能的电池组。要重新激活，需要重新分配电力，并把定居点的设备从电网中断开。
languages.original_text: The xenos have compromised the batteries feeding the elevator. Reactivation requires rerouting power and cutting off settlement devices from the grid.

traits.locale_text: 异形破坏了为电梯供能的电池组。要重新激活，需要重新分配电力，并把定居点的设备从电网中断开。

languages.text: Les xénos ont compromis les batteries qui alimentent l'ascenseur. Pour le remettre en état de marche, il est nécessaire de détourner l'alimentation en déconnectant certains dispositifs de la colonie.
languages.original_text: The xenos have compromised the batteries feeding the elevator. Reactivation requires rerouting power and cutting off settlement devices from the grid.

traits.locale_text: Les xénos ont compromis les batteries qui alimentent l'ascenseur. Pour le remettre en état de marche, il est nécessaire de détourner l'alimentation en déconnectant certains dispositifs de la colonie.

languages.text: Zenolar, asansörü besleyen bataryaları bozdu. Yeniden etkinleştirme, gücün yeniden yönlendirilmesini ve yerleşim cihazlarının şebekeden kesilmesini gerektiriyor.
languages.original_text: The xenos have compromised the batteries feeding the elevator. Reactivation requires rerouting power and cutting off settlement devices from the grid.

traits.locale_text: Zenolar, asansörü besleyen bataryaları bozdu. Yeniden etkinleştirme, gücün yeniden yönlendirilmesini ve yerleşim cihazlarının şebekeden kesilmesini gerektiriyor.

languages.text: 異星生物がエレベーターの電源を供給するバッテリーを破壊した。再起動には電力経路の変更と、居住区の機器を電力網から切り離す必要がある。
languages.original_text: The xenos have compromised the batteries feeding the elevator. Reactivation requires rerouting power and cutting off settlement devices from the grid.

traits.locale_text: 異星生物がエレベーターの電源を供給するバッテリーを破壊した。再起動には電力経路の変更と、居住区の機器を電力網から切り離す必要がある。

languages.text: Die Xenos haben die Batterien kompromittiert, die den Aufzug versorgen. Für seine Reaktivierung muss Strom umgeleitet und die Energieversorgung der Geräte der Siedlung abgeschaltet werden.
languages.original_text: The xenos have compromised the batteries feeding the elevator. Reactivation requires rerouting power and cutting off settlement devices from the grid.

traits.locale_text: Die Xenos haben die Batterien kompromittiert, die den Aufzug versorgen. Für seine Reaktivierung muss Strom umgeleitet und die Energieversorgung der Geräte der Siedlung abgeschaltet werden.
